originalTitle: Gunmen raid Nigerian orphanage and kidnap children
title: Gunmen raid Nigerian orphanage and kidnap children
content: The attack saw 23 children and the facility's proprietress kidnapped by gunmen on Sunday.

originalTitle: Plane crash in South Sudan kills all 15 on board
title: Plane crash in South Sudan kills all 15 on board
content: The authorities are investigating but early reports suggest bad weather and poor visibility may be to blame.

originalTitle: Russian fighters confirm withdrawal from northern Mali city after separatist attacks
title: Russian fighters confirm withdrawal from northern Mali city after separatist attacks
content: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups.

originalTitle: Leavitt blames democrats for ‘cult of hatred’ against Trump
title: Leavitt blames democrats for ‘cult of hatred’ against Trump
content: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt blamed democrats for promoting the rhetoric which fuels 'cult of hatred'.

originalTitle: Will vote make a difference to Palestinians under Israeli occupation?
title: Will vote make a difference to Palestinians under Israeli occupation?
content: The Palestinian Authority's Fatah party and its affiliates sweep council vote.

originalTitle: Who holds the cards in Iran-US talks?
title: Who holds the cards in Iran-US talks?
content: Both the US and Iran claim to have the upper hand in negotiations over the war, but who holds the cards?

originalTitle: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
title: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
content: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".

originalTitle: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
title: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
content: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.

title: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
content: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.

originalTitle: Rangers blink but twists still to come in colossal title race
title: Rangers blink but twists still to come in colossal title race
content: This epic Scottish Premiership season won't be over until it's over, writes Tom English.

originalTitle: Man Utd survive Brentford fight back to earn crucial win
title: Man Utd survive Brentford fight back to earn crucial win
content: Manchester United hold their nerve as first-half goals from Casemiro and Benjamin Sesko are enough for them to win an entertaining encounter with Brentford.

originalTitle: Arsenal expect Havertz to play in title run-in
title: Arsenal expect Havertz to play in title run-in
content: Arsenal expect Kai Havertz to play a part in their title run-in despite the forward suffering a muscular injury against Newcastle.
